growth_records.notes: [Central point (runs 9-12, mean, n=4)] Design (Table 1): pH 5.0, polydextrose 1.0%, 100 rpm, 30 C. Shaken 2 L Erlenmeyer (450 mL working vol), 24 h, sampled every 3 h; OD600->gDW via y=1.3677x-0.0008. Facultative-anaerobe LAB grown in shaken (not sparged) flask = treated aerobic. pH is the INITIAL adjusted value (HCl); pH not controlled and fell during fermentation (Table 3 pH-decrease). mu_max=0.87/h and t_g=0.84 h reported by authors (Table 2, eqs mu=1/(tf-t0)*ln(Xf/X0), tg=ln2/mu). qS(glucose)=0.05 gS/gX/h (Table 3); mmol/gDW/h = 0.05/180.16*1000 = 0.278. qP(lactic acid)=0.08 gP/gX/h; mmol/gDW/h = 0.08/90.08*1000 = 0.888. Glucose consumed over 24 h dS=7.45 gS/L; lactic acid P=8.7 gP/L (Table 3). Table-3 column 'S' is glucose CONSUMED over 24 h (text: run 2 'glucose consumption 15.00 g/L = 68.74% of initial' => initial dextrose ~21.8 g/L, consistent with MRS ~20 g/L; footnote wording 'concentration after 24h' is inconsistent, text is authoritative). Yields (Tables 2/3): Yx/s=0.62 gX/gS, Yp/s=1.04 gP/gS, Yp/x=1.87 gP/gX. Full MRS base composition not itemized in paper (commercial Difco); only polydextrose supplement level stated.
